sanskrit:
विधिहीनमसृष्टान्नं मन्त्रहीनमदक्षिणम्।
श्रद्धाविरहितं यज्ञं तामसं परिचक्षते॥
transliteration:
vidhi-hīnam asṛṣṭānnaṃ mantra-hīnam adakṣiṇam |
śraddhā-virahitaṃ yajñaṃ tāmasaṃ paricakṣate ||
literal_meaning: A sacrifice devoid of scriptural procedure, without distribution of food, without Vedic chants, without priestly gifts, and devoid of faith is declared to be in the mode of darkness (tamas).
contextual_meaning: Rituals performed mechanically, without generosity, sacred sound, or inner conviction, mirror a psyche stuck in apathy and cynicism—outward show without inner substance.
psychological_state: Performative religiosity masking spiritual bankruptcy; a defense against confronting existential meaninglessness.
trigger_scenario: Posting inspirational quotes on social media while privately feeling hollow and never donating time or money.
anchor_text: Ritual without heart, generosity, or sacred sound is lifeless show.
